draft.message: G'day Brendananis Monster! How pumped are you that the Oonagii Vinyl Release is finally in distribution? I know there's still some metadata pending and an artwork upload error to fix - no stress if it's been a while, I'm here to help if needed. When can we catch up and get this wrapped up for the Jan 15th release?
